Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course directly focuses on 'intellectual property litigation' and 'litigation system,' promoting the rule of law and access to justice (Target 16.3).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course aims to 'develop a global perspective' and intellectual property law inherently relates to technology and knowledge sharing (Target 17.6), though the focus is on litigation, not partnerships.
